title: Ukrainian Corn Fritters
description: Crispy corn fritters with a Ukrainian twist, perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, eggs, milk, and salt.
2. Add crumbled bacon, grated cheese, minced onion, and crushed garlic to the bowl. Mix well.
3. Heat a large skillet with about 1/2 inch of oil over medium-high heat.
4. Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the cornmeal mixture into the skillet.
5. Flatten the mixture slightly with a spatula and fry for 3-4 minutes on each side.
6. Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
